note_text: Wound note - Leftlowerleg. Meas 3.1x2.4x0.2cm. Heavy serosang drainage, odor present. Wound bed 77% gran, 23% slough. Periwound macerated. Foam dsg changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Okafor notified.

Wound note - Leftlowerleg. Meas 3.1x2.4x0.2cm. Heavy serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 36% gran, 64% slough. Periwound erythematous. NPWT canister changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Patel notified.
